title: MLOps and AI governance

title: MLOps and AI governance
subtitle: The best AI habit is simple: document what works, measure the outcome, and improve the workflow.
caption:
AI career note: MLOps and AI governance

The best AI habit is simple: document what works, measure the outcome, and improve the workflow.

Practical move: Measure the result: time saved, quality improved, or risk reduced.

Motivation: You do not need to master every AI tool. You need to build the habit of learning, testing, and applying AI where it creates real value.
